hooks.command: $j = ($input -join '') | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -and (Test-Path $f -PathType Leaf)) { $c = Get-Content $f -Raw -EA 0; if ($c) { $w = @(); if ($c -match 'sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}') { $w += 'API key (sk- prefix)' }; if ($c -match 'PRIVATE KEY') { $w += 'private key block' }; if ($c -match '\.innerHTML\s*=[^=]') { $w += 'innerHTML (XSS risk)' }; if ($c -match '\beval\s*\(') { $w += 'eval() call' }; if ($w.Count -gt 0) { [pscustomobject]@{systemMessage=('SECURITY: ' + ($w -join '; ') + ' detected in ' + $f)} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } } }
